top_signals.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
top_signals.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: UK manufacturers facing ‘steel quota cliff edge’
top_signals.summary: Manufacturers are facing a cliff-edge from the government’s incoming steel tariffs that are likely to inflict “huge damage” on the UK economy, Britain’s largest industry body has warned. In a fresh statement, the British Chambers of Commerce (BCC) sounded the alarm on the impact that that new duties on foreign-produced steel will have on importers, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Australia LNG Union Reaches Deal to End Strikes at Ichthys
top_signals.summary: Unions in Australia and Japan’s Inpex Corp. reached an agreement to end strikes at the Ichthys liquefied natural gas export facility after weeks of industrial action.

top_signals.title: MANTRA to be acquired by Inveniam, backer that invested $20 million last year
top_signals.summary: The deal comes after MANTRA’s token suffered a major collapse in 2025 and then the company announced a restructure and layoffs.
